project.title: Single Dad Applied as a Janitor
project.description: Câu chuyện Jonas Reed xin làm lao công, CEO Marin Vale nhận ra anh là người đã cứu sự nghiệp cô 8 năm trước

style: photorealistic cinematic film still, 35mm film look, natural skin texture, soft depth of field, clean frame free of watermarks, logos, or AI icons
flashback_style: soft warm vignette, slightly faded colors, dreamy atmosphere

video_hook.video_style: photorealistic cinematic footage, 35mm film look, natural motion, smooth stabilized camera, clean frame free of watermarks, logos, or AI icons

characters.name: Marin Vale
characters.description: 34-year-old woman, shoulder-length black hair, gray blazer, confident posture, CEO appearance

characters.name: Jonas Reed
characters.description: 36-year-old man, short brown hair, blue button-down shirt, sturdy build, calm steady eyes

characters.name: Jonas Reed (28 tuổi)
characters.description: 28-year-old man, short brown hair, wet gray hoodie, worn sneakers, soaked from rain

characters.name: Marin Vale (26 tuổi)
characters.description: 26-year-old woman, long black hair in ponytail, oversized sweater, tired but hopeful eyes

characters.name: Lydia
characters.description: 40-year-old woman, neat bun hairstyle, white blouse, tablet in hand, professional assistant

characters.name: Tessa Reed
characters.description: 9-year-old girl, brown hair in braids, school backpack, curious bright eyes

characters.name: Griffin
characters.description: 45-year-old man, receding hairline, wire-rimmed glasses, dress shirt with rolled sleeves, lead engineer

characters.name: Derek
characters.description: stocky man, hard hat, high-vis vest, weathered face, crew lead

settings.name: Văn phòng CEO
settings.keywords: modern corporate office, large mahogany desk, floor-to-ceiling windows, city skyline view, warm afternoon light

settings.name: Hành lang ngập nước (8 năm trước)
settings.keywords: dimly lit apartment hallway at night, wet floor, flickering fluorescent light, rain outside, worn walls

settings.name: Khu Riverside District bên ngoài
settings.keywords: four aging residential tower buildings, cracked concrete courtyard, laundry lines between windows, chain-link fence playground, urban waterfront

settings.name: Tầng hầm tòa nhà Riverside
settings.keywords: old concrete basement, exposed conduit pipes, low ceiling, junction boxes on walls, utility closet, dim fluorescent lighting

settings.name: Văn phòng công trường
settings.keywords: temporary site office, folding tables, blueprints spread out, hard hats on hooks, whiteboard with project timeline

mood_map.nostalgic: soft golden light, warm palette, slight gaussian blur
mood_map.tense: cool blue-gray tones, hard shadows, tight framing
mood_map.hopeful: morning light, open composition, warm highlights
mood_map.shock: dramatic side lighting, shallow DOF, extreme close-up
mood_map.calm: even soft lighting, neutral tones, balanced composition
mood_map.sad: muted desaturated palette, overcast lighting, empty space
mood_map.determined: strong directional light, firm posture, clear focus
mood_map.dismissive: cold office light, distant framing, clinical atmosphere
